allow: Bash(node -e "const {Pool} = require\('@neondatabase/serverless'\); const p = new Pool\({connectionString: 'postgresql://test:test@example.com/db'}\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.options\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Count:', len\(d\)\); [print\(json.dumps\({'name':x['name'],'validFrom':x['validFrom'],'validTo':x['validTo']},indent=2\)\) for x in d[:2]]")
